---
title: "Home"
format: html
lightbox: true
---

![](include/img/banner-2026.png)

## About

This site documents and describes the 2026 Open Scholarship Bootcamp to be held on the University Park campus of [the Pennsylvania State University](https://www.psu.edu) Monday, May 11 and Tuesday, May 12, 2026.

## Goals {.unnumbered}

-   To create a focal point for activity and learning related to open scholarship practices.
-   To accelerate the development of a community of scholars who are interested in open scholarship.
-   To plan next steps that will foster the emergence of a robust open scholarship community at Penn State.

## Location

The Bootcamp will be held at the Pattee and Paterno Libraries on the Penn State University Park campus.
The Dewey Room on Ground floor of the Collaboration Commons in (W043) Pattee Library is the principal location. See [this link](wayfinding.qmd) for specific directions.

![](include/img/psu_pattee_gallery2.jpg)

## Registration

::: callout-important
## To register
Visit <https://forms.gle/myMCqAZsAHXQBy4n7>.
:::

![Data about the home colleges or units of registered participants. See [Registration Data](registration.qmd) for details.](include/fig/fig-regis-dept-coll-1.png){#fig-registration-units width="75%"}

## Support

The Bootcamp would not be possible without the generosity of our sponsors:

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](include/img/csc-logo.png){fig-align="center"}
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="55%"}
[Child Study Center (CSC)](https://csc.la.psu.edu)
:::
::::::

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](include/img/libraries.png)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="55%"}
[Penn State University Libraries](https://libraries.psu.edu)
:::
::::::

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](include/img/icds.png)
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
[Institute for Computational and Data Sciences (ICDS)](https://www.icds.psu.edu)
:::
::::::

::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](include/img/ssri-logo.png)
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
[Social Sciences Research Institute (SSRI)](https://ssri.psu.edu/)
:::
::::::

::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](include/img/psychology.png)
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
[Department of Psychology](https://psych.la.psu.edu)
:::
::::::

::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](include/img/statistics-dept.png)
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
[Department of Statistics](https://science.psu.edu/stat)
:::
::::::
